summary: Backend-only regression executed for restored wc2026tracker features. Local build succeeded and restored feature files/routes are present in source and build output. Public API validation on preview URL shows partial contract failure: /api/stats?action=usage and /api/results pass, but /api/health still returns 404.

critical.issue: Returns 404 instead of expected health JSON contract (200 with ok=true when production keys are configured, or 503 JSON if unhealthy).

action_items: Fix deployment route/artifact mismatch so /api/health is deployed on the same preview where /api/stats and /api/results already work.
Re-deploy current branch and re-run backend endpoint suite against the exact preview URL.
Keep REDIS_URL and STATS_API_KEY configured in that same Vercel environment; then verify /api/health, /api/stats?action=usage, and /api/results together.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature restoration requested by user is present in source: Compare route/page, ThemePicker, favorites components/hook, Trophy3D, MatchDayToday, MyTeams, ShareBracketModal.
Build artifact confirms restored chunks are compiled (Compare and Trophy3D present in dist assets).
API handlers exist in repo (/api/health.js, /api/stats.js, /api/results.js); failure pattern indicates deployment-level partial route exposure, not missing source code.
seed_data_creation: Temporary key TEST_T1_<uuid> was written to /api/results during persistence test and restored to original payload in cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This run executed pytest with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://wc2026-nine-sepia.vercel.app. Results: 4 passed, 1 failed (only /api/health 404). Local build succeeded and feature files/wiring were verified via code scan and dist output.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: run test_wc2026tracker_vercel_endpoints against wc2026-nine-sepia.vercel.app. /api/stats?action=usage and /api/results return 200 with valid payloads, but /api/health returns 404 on same host. Root cause is likely deployment routing/artifact mismatch for this single function path. Mitigation: redeploy same commit/branch to same Vercel project and validate health function registration; then rerun regression suite. MOCKED APIs: NONE.
